TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: === === 男子名 Maray 命名的原則與方式 lalu likuy qu Maray. tlalu miray aki iyat bahun kmzyap yaqih utux ru ini tringi behuy qu yabut muci bnkis. maki' uzi ga, mrkyas laqi mlikuy lga, aki mhyuci hmali ru mmiray ngqwaq lmuhuw. baq balay mqwas i Maray. (Maray很會唱歌.) cyux smalit k'man qu Maray. (Maray在砍草.)
S.PHON: === === *** maraj ******** lalu likuj qu maraj. tlalu miraj aki ijat βaħun kmzjap jaqiħ utux ru ini triŋi βeħuj qu jaβut muʦ~ʨi βnkis~ɕ. makiʔ uzi ɣa, mrkjas~ɕ laqi mlikuj lɣa, aki mħjuʦ~ʨi ħmali ru mmiraj ŋqwaq lmuħuw. βaq βalaj mqwas~ɕ i maraj. (maraj****.) ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕmalit kʔman qu maraj. (maraj***.)
S.FORM: === === 男子名 Maray 命名的原則與方式 lalu likuy qu Maray. tlalu miray aki iyat bahun kmzyap yaqih utux ru ini tringi behuy qu yabut muci bnkis. maki' uzi ga, mrkyas laqi mlikuy lga, aki mhyuci hmali ru mmiray ngqwaq lmuhuw. baq balay mqwas i Maray. (Maray很會唱歌.) cyux smalit k'man qu Maray. (Maray在砍草.)
S.PHON: === === *** maraj ******** lalu likuj qu maraj. tlalu miraj aki ijat βaħun kmzjap jaqiħ utux ru ini triŋi βeħuj qu jaβut muʦ~ʨi βnkis~ɕ. makiʔ uzi ɣa, mrkjas~ɕ laqi mlikuj lɣa, aki mħjuʦ~ʨi ħmali ru mmiraj ŋqwaq lmuħuw. βaq βalaj mqwas~ɕ i maraj. (maraj****.) ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕmalit kʔman qu maraj. (maraj***.)
